source: website/src/components/forms/*, payment/PaymentForm.tsx, appointments/AppointmentForm.tsx, services/ServiceForm.tsx, employees/EmployeeForm.tsx, pages/Login.tsx

validations.rule: customer name cannot be empty
validations.evidence: validateCustomerForm: if (!data.name.trim()) errors.push({ field: 'name', message: 'Vui lòng nhập tên' })

validations.rule: customer phone cannot be empty
validations.evidence: validateCustomerForm: if (!data.phone.trim()) errors.push({ field: 'phone', message: 'Vui lòng nhập sđt' })

validations.rule: phone number must not already exist in the system
validations.evidence: useUniqueCheck(checkPartnerExists): setPhoneError('Số điện thoại đã tồn tại')

validations.rule: email must not already exist in the system
validations.evidence: useUniqueCheck(checkPartnerExists): setEmailError('Email đã tồn tại')

validations.rule: phone input uses type=tel for mobile keyboard and basic browser format validation
validations.evidence: <input type="tel" value={formData.phone} />

validations.rule: branch/location must be selected for customer
validations.evidence: <FieldLabel icon={MapPin} required> + getError('companyid') displayed

validations.rule: customer weight must be >= 0
validations.evidence: <input type="number" min={0} />

validations.rule: walk-in patient name cannot be empty
validations.evidence: if (!form.name.trim()) next.name = 'Vui lòng nhập tên'

validations.rule: walk-in patient phone cannot be empty
validations.evidence: if (!form.phone.trim()) next.phone = 'Vui lòng nhập số điện thoại'

validations.rule: walk-in phone must not already exist (live check via useUniqueCheck)
validations.evidence: const { phoneError, check: checkUnique } = useUniqueCheck(checkPartnerExists)

validations.rule: customer must be selected for appointment
validations.evidence: if (!customerId) newErrors.customer = 'Vui lòng chọn khách hàng'

validations.rule: doctor must be selected for appointment
validations.evidence: if (!doctorId) newErrors.doctor = 'Vui lòng chọn bác sĩ'

validations.rule: branch location must be selected for appointment
validations.evidence: if (!locationId) newErrors.location = 'Vui lòng chọn chi nhánh'

validations.rule: appointment date must be selected
validations.evidence: if (!date) newErrors.date = 'Vui lòng chọn ngày'

validations.rule: appointment start time must be selected
validations.evidence: if (!startTime) newErrors.startTime = 'Vui lòng chọn giờ bắt đầu'

validations.rule: end time must be after start time when provided
validations.evidence: if (endTime && startTime && endTime <= startTime) newErrors.endTime = 'Giờ kết thúc phải sau giờ bắt đầu'

validations.rule: estimated duration must be between 5 and 300 minutes, step 5
validations.evidence: <input type="number" min={5} max={300} step={5} />

validations.rule: customer must be selected to create payment
validations.evidence: if (!customerId) newErrors.customer = 'Vui lòng chọn khách hàng'

validations.rule: a payment record (sale order) must be selected
validations.evidence: if (!selectedRecordId) newErrors.record = 'Vui lòng chọn hồ sơ cần thanh toán'

validations.rule: total payment amount must be > 0
validations.evidence: if (totalPayment <= 0) newErrors.amount = 'Tổng số tiền phải lớn hơn 0'

validations.rule: deposit amount cannot exceed available wallet balance
validations.evidence: if (depositAmount > availableDeposit) newErrors.deposit = `Số dư ví chỉ có ${formatVND(availableDeposit)}`

validations.rule: deposit amount cannot be negative
validations.evidence: if (depositAmount < 0) newErrors.deposit = 'Số tiền không hợp lệ'

validations.rule: cash amount cannot be negative
validations.evidence: if (cashAmount < 0) newErrors.cash = 'Số tiền không hợp lệ'

validations.rule: bank transfer amount cannot be negative
validations.evidence: if (bankAmount < 0) newErrors.bank = 'Số tiền không hợp lệ'

validations.rule: total payment cannot exceed outstanding balance on the selected record (1% tolerance)
validations.evidence: if (selectedRecord && totalPayment > selectedRecord.residual * 1.01) newErrors.amount = `Số tiền vượt quá còn nợ (...)`

validations.rule: deposit input HTML min=0
validations.evidence: <input type="number" min={0} max={availableDeposit} />

validations.rule: deposit input HTML max=availableDeposit
validations.evidence: <input type="number" min={0} max={availableDeposit} />

validations.rule: cash input HTML min=0
validations.evidence: <input type="number" min={0} />

validations.rule: bank transfer input HTML min=0
validations.evidence: <input type="number" min={0} />

validations.rule: a catalog service item must be selected
validations.evidence: if (!catalogItemId) newErrors.service = 'Vui lòng chọn dịch vụ'

validations.rule: customer must be selected for service record
validations.evidence: if (!customerId) newErrors.customer = 'Vui lòng chọn khách hàng'

validations.rule: doctor must be selected for service record
validations.evidence: if (!doctorId) newErrors.doctor = 'Vui lòng chọn bác sĩ'

validations.rule: branch location must be selected for service record
validations.evidence: if (!locationId) newErrors.location = 'Vui lòng chọn chi nhánh'

validations.rule: service start date must be selected
validations.evidence: if (!startDate) newErrors.startDate = 'Vui lòng chọn ngày bắt đầu'

validations.rule: service quantity must be >= 1
validations.evidence: <input type="number" min={1} />

validations.rule: employee name cannot be empty
validations.evidence: if (!name.trim()) { setError('Vui lòng nhập tên nhân viên') }

validations.rule: employee name input has HTML required attribute
validations.evidence: <input type="text" required />

validations.rule: password is required when creating a new employee (not on edit)
validations.evidence: if (!isEdit && !password.trim()) { setError('Vui lòng nhập mật khẩu') }

validations.rule: password input has HTML required attribute only on create
validations.evidence: {...(!isEdit ? { required: true } : {})}

validations.rule: phone input uses type=tel for mobile keyboard and browser format hint
validations.evidence: <input type="tel" value={phone} />

validations.rule: email input uses type=email for browser format validation
validations.evidence: <input type="email" value={email} />

validations.rule: email is required to log in
validations.evidence: <input type="email" required />

validations.rule: email must be a valid email address (browser type=email validation)
validations.evidence: <input type="email" />

validations.rule: password is required to log in
validations.evidence: <input type="password" required />

validations.rule: treatment total amount must be >= 0
validations.evidence: <input type="number" min={0} />

validations.rule: down payment percentage must be between 0% and 50%, step 5%
validations.evidence: <input type="range" min={0} max={50} step={5} />

validations.rule: QR payment amount must be >= 0
validations.evidence: <input type="number" min={0} />
